# Changes from 1.6.1 to 1.6.2

_Aggregated from releases across the o3-shop GitHub organisation since <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/releases/tag/v1.6.1"><code>shop-ce v1.6.1</code></a> (2026-06-04). Last updated: 2026-07-02 08:49 UTC._

## shop-ce (v1.6.2)

* bin/release: print a click-and-finish checklist at end of a live run by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/169">shop-ce#169</a>
* Wire tinymce-editor module as a dev satellite (#194) by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/172">shop-ce#172</a>
* feat: Add bootstrap.custom.php support for local/environment-specific initialization by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/170">shop-ce#170</a>
* fix: guard image-decode failures in resize helpers (PHP 8 TypeError → HTTP 500) by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/173">shop-ce#173</a>
* fix: add missing admin help translations, fix wrong ones, sort language files by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/174">shop-ce#174</a>
* Setup mod_rewrite check false-negatives behind reverse proxy / DDEV (blocks install) by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/175">shop-ce#175</a>
* setup xdebug in shop-app container for step debugging with IDE by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/178">shop-ce#178</a>
* fix(#171): resolve revocation templates through theme inheritance by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/177">shop-ce#177</a>
* fix(#190): bin/release pre-flight gate — enforce delete_branch_on_merge=false on final releases by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/176">shop-ce#176</a>
* feat(#213): pluggable core CAPTCHA layer + Google reCAPTCHA module by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/180">shop-ce#180</a>
* Add oe:theme:activate CLI; consolidate theme defaults to theme.php by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/181">shop-ce#181</a>
* feat(#213): fail closed when CAPTCHA consent is required but not granted by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/183">shop-ce#183</a>
* feat(#213): config-driven cookie-consent mode for core CAPTCHA by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/184">shop-ce#184</a>
* fix: add missing oxconfigdisplay entries for blShowSubcatTiles and sEnable3xl by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/egate-media-Frank">@egate-media-Frank</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/185">shop-ce#185</a>
* fix: seed contactFormRequiredFields in initial_data.sql by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/egate-media-Frank">@egate-media-Frank</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/186">shop-ce#186</a>
* Run database migrations automatically on composer update (with no-DB guard) (#192) by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/171">shop-ce#171</a>

* feat(#145): auto-bump theme.php version line at release time by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/132">shop-ce#132</a>
* feat(#137): fail quality gate when coverage drops below 90% by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/133">shop-ce#133</a>
* perf(#112): speed up admin order overview (SQL index-friendliness + skip stats on detail view) by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/138">shop-ce#138</a>
* fix(#125): Config::reinitialize must clear in-memory params before re-init by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/139">shop-ce#139</a>
* feat(#143): bin/oe-console oe:user:change-password + oe:user:create --role={admin|customer} by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/134">shop-ce#134</a>

* 166 sourcebootstrapphp rewrite hard references exithandler breaks composer install for any 13x 16x upgrade with a non empty vendor by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/156">shop-ce#156</a>

* Adjust bin/release for the metapackage fold-out by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/157">shop-ce#157</a>
* fix(#166): guard ExitHandler registration with interface_exists() by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/158">shop-ce#158</a>
* refactor(#169): tag shop-metapackage-ce at --to verbatim (drop the --bump workaround) by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/159">shop-ce#159</a>
* German language inactive by default — should ship active by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/160">shop-ce#160</a>
* fix: export SHOP_CONTAINER for playwright suite after #148 rename by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/161">shop-ce#161</a>
* Security review: symfony/yaml & symfony/polyfill-intl-idn CVEs (Low) — not exploitable in O3-Shop; yaml fix deferred to Symfony stack migration by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/162">shop-ce#162</a>
* fix: update initial_data.sql for o3-Theme v1.4.0 color settings by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/egate-media-Frank">@egate-media-Frank</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/165">shop-ce#165</a>

* <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/egate-media-Frank">@egate-media-Frank</a> made their first contribution in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/165">shop-ce#165</a>

## o3-Theme (v1.5.3)

**What Changed**

- Fixing a bug where old shops crashed because of the new Captcha System - <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a>
* fix: translate German comments to English in widget JS files by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/egate-media-Frank">@egate-media-Frank</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/o3-Theme/pull/34">o3-Theme#34</a>
* feat(#213): render CAPTCHA widget into the 7 form blocks by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/o3-Theme/pull/35">o3-Theme#35</a>
* Add 8 missing feature/footer/article toggles to theme.php by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/o3-Theme/pull/36">o3-Theme#36</a>
* fix: remove whitespace inside contact textarea that misplaces cursor by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/egate-media-Frank">@egate-media-Frank</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/o3-Theme/pull/37">o3-Theme#37</a>
* fix: show text pill for manufacturers without icon on manufacturer list by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/egate-media-Frank">@egate-media-Frank</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/o3-Theme/pull/38">o3-Theme#38</a>
* fix: add missing English DD_FOOTER_O3ShopLink translation by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/o3-Theme/pull/31">o3-Theme#31</a>
* fix: contact map derives from shop address instead of placeholder by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/o3-Theme/pull/32">o3-Theme#32</a>
* v1.5.0 - 3xl-size, subcategory tiles, template fixes, CSS consolidation by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/egate-media-Frank">@egate-media-Frank</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/o3-Theme/pull/33">o3-Theme#33</a>
